asset.title: Proposals Wall Review
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview successfully demonstrates transitioning from a spreadsheet view to the collaborative Wall view to review proposals, supported by real-time trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the user switching from the Spreadsheet tab to the Wall tab to inspect active proposal cards.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the before state (spreadsheet), the action (clicking Wall), and the result (proposal cards displayed).

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed layout, though the multi-pane interface is dense and visually busy.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, walls, agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic financial data and agent interactions.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the chat and trace logs may require zooming on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating collaborative audit and financial reconciliation workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows actual UI transitions and state changes without simulated overlays.

defects.observed: Text in the chat and trace panels is quite small and hard to read at standard resolutions.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size or zoom the browser slightly during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Reviewing and reconciling financial proposals on the collaborative Wall.
